hooks.command: SETTINGS="${CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR:-$HOME/.claude}/settings.json"; LOCK="$SETTINGS.lock"; while ! mkdir "$LOCK" 2>/dev/null; do sleep 0.1; done; trap 'rmdir "$LOCK" 2>/dev/null' EXIT; if [ -f "$SETTINGS" ] && command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then jq '.companyAnnouncements = ((.companyAnnouncements // []) | map(select(startswith("Welcome to Company") | not))) + ["Welcome to Company Claude Code - served via https://litellm.company.example.com/"]' "$SETTINGS" > "$SETTINGS.tmp.ann" && mv "$SETTINGS.tmp.ann" "$SETTINGS"; fi

if [ -n "$LITELLM_KEY" ]; then SETTINGS="${CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR:-$HOME/.claude}/settings.json"; LOCK="$SETTINGS.lock"; while ! mkdir "$LOCK" 2>/dev/null; do sleep 0.1; done; trap 'rmdir "$LOCK" 2>/dev/null' EXIT; if [ -f "$SETTINGS" ] && command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then jq --arg key "$LITELLM_KEY" '.env.ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN = $key | .env.ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL = "https://litellm.company.example.com/"' "$SETTINGS" > "$SETTINGS.tmp.key" && mv "$SETTINGS.tmp.key" "$SETTINGS"; fi; fi
